name: Ignis
description: Ignis produces a stream of intense heat.

components.description: Ignis produces a stream of intense heat.

components.name: Detonite Injector
components.description:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.1.4
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the Ignis Wraith’s Blueprint replication price from 15k to 20k Credits. 
Recently the Ignis Wraith Blueprint was made accessible to all clans. This included making the Blueprint sellable for the price it was sold at, so stockpilers could regain the credits they spent. With matching buy and sell prices, some players were moving large quantities of blueprints for net zero gain, which caused unexpected problems.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Ignis
Ignis Wraith
This is primarily targeted at the Ignis Wraith 
Ignis Wraith Research is now available to all Clans!
Take a trip down memory lane with me as we travel back to 2017. Operation: The Pacifism Defect event concludes, and the top 10% of Clans in their tier are awarded the Research for the Ignis Wraith. Fast forward to 2022, and Research remains within those Clans, showing some unfortunate side effects of Trading manipulation. After internal discussion, the team decided to add the Ignis Wraith Research to all Clans with some rules:
Ignis Wraith Blueprint Research requires the Clan to have a Rank of 10 and will be three times more expensive 
Ignis Wraith Blueprint is now untradable 
Ignis Wraith Blueprint's sell price is now equal to the acquire price of 15,000 Credits

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash related to the Ignis’ fire tracing.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.9
patchlogs.fixes: This also fixes heat trace weapons (eg. Ignis, Klamora Prism Amp, etc.) and beam weapons being visually reflected by Guardian Shell.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Ignis

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.3
Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes: Ignis Wraith Blueprint has been added to Grineer Railjack missions as Point of Interest rewards!

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Rhino Stomp, Convergence Orbs, and the Ignis shooting FX appearing translucent when Adaptive Exposure is enabled. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1119942-semi-transparent-objectstextures-almost-invisible/

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ignis’ Energy color appearing defaulted in reflections when in mission.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed new Clan members able to Research the Ignis Wraith in a Clan that does not have access to that specific Research.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.3
patchlogs.changes: Made a micro optimization to Ignis effect scripts.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked material layer coverage for the Ignis Towsun Skin clip.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ignis Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Mesa's Ballistic Battery not working with the Ignis.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed missing fire FX when using the Ignis/Ignis Wraith with Blast Damage.
End point of Ignis weapons are now 1m from 3m in Conclave.
Ignis magazine capacity reduced to 30 in Conclave.
Ignis Wraith mag capacity reduced to 40 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Ignis and Ignis Wraith are now usable in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ignis (and similar weapons) being able to damage friendly Gara's Spectrorage mirrors.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed continuous weapons (Ignis, etc) getting extreme Range when used in Limbo’s Stasis.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed continuous weapons (Ignis, etc) receiving extreme Range when used with Limbo’s Stasis.
Fixed an issue with the Ignis Wraith Research being available for unqualified clans. Any clans with this will have it removed following a script. 4/20/2017 Update: The Script has been run and 1644 Clans have had the unearned research removed.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed trading for the Ignis Wraith Blueprint resulting in having the Ignis Wraith Research in an unqualified Dojo.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when firing the Ignis while in Limbo’s Stasis.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an outdated model of the Ignis being visible in the Clan Training Diorama.
Fixed the Ignis firing FX sometime not showing up if you tap the fire button.
Fixed issue where players could get hit and take fire Proc damage when outside FX range of Scorch's Ignis.
Fixed Hyekka Master and Scorch’s firing their Ignis’ too high.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Hotfix 19.12.1+19.12.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Hyekka Master being able to hit Limbo in the Rift with her Ignis if there are other enemies around Limbo.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.changes: Ignis flame FX and the transition of Ignis’ flame particles fading on ceasefire has been visually improved!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes: Hyekka Masters: Fixed the Hyekka Master’s Ignis dealing damage through walls.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.1
patchlogs.changes: •    Reduced the Hyekka Master’s Ignis damage by almost half and reduced the status chance by 10%.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Hush and Hushed Invisibility not applying to the Ignis.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Slightly adjusted the Ignis’ audio FX.
Fixed the Grakata, Prisma Grakata, and Embolist improperly using the Ignis’ reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.3.1 + 18.3.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an improper fire visual FX that would appear on the Ignis in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ignis model not looking properly when the weapon is stolen from the Drahk Master and placed on the ground.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.9.0
patchlogs.changes: The Ignis will now char the corpses of enemies slain.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.additions: The Ignis has received a visual overhaul and has received the following stat changes:Increased fire range.
patchlogs.fixes: The Twin Basolk are nasty little hatchets that slice through steel as if it were flesh and the Ignis gets a completely new look!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the brightness of flames produced by the Ignis.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Improved the performance of the Ignis visual effects.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Grakata and Ignis not properly aiming if the player attempted to aim while in the middle of a reload animation

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ignis not using energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Changed logic that determines visual representation of damage mods on continuous-fire weapons (eg: Synapse, Ignis, etc).

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: Fixed issue that allowed spectators to fire the Ignis and Flux rifle while spectating in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 10.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Changed Ignis’s default colour to represent realistic fire, not white flames.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.3.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fix for Flux Rifle and Ignis not being able to damage reactor cores or Orokin death orbs.
The above fix also fixes not being able to pop Saryn's venom orbs with Flux Rifle & Ignis.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed continuous fire AoE weapons (Ignis, Embolist) from hitting the same target multiple times per shot when in ragdoll.
Fixed weapons that played reload sounds twice (Ignis, Grakata, Embolist)
Fixed Ignis and other weapons causing Pickups to go crazy if they had not come to rest in Conclave duels.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Ignis and other weapons causing Pickups to go crazy by flying off the map if they had not come to rest.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes:
Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.
FX tweaks to Ignis

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ignis and Flux Rifle showing a clip size of 1.$ in the arsenal
